{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":145},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7416339817071543065","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事流畅，前期非常有带入感，后期也还行，弟弟八岁的性子虽然有点傻，但是符合人设年龄。伏笔埋得好，希望后面有好的结局。期待[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1726755451,"group_id":"7412679765724761113","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为了表达对这个世界的认知；为了纪念回不去的过去……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ON95/a2jKCUDhVhlIJTya03IDpswnF3CdDu/7A+W7m","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4130232168889485","user_name":"用户41302321"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4130232168889485","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412679765724761113","book_info":{"abstract":"前世，父母偏爱弟弟，让李昱感受不到爱，他想尽办法讨好家人仍不得，却依然在危机四伏的废土世界守护家人十年，为人族默默奉献。
最后竟被诬陷成叛徒，被他守护的人类审判，父母、弟弟、至爱冷漠的看着他被斩首示众。
重生之后，李昱决定抛弃讨好所有人，只为自己而活，独自在废土升级。
谁知偏爱弟弟的父母，竟然一反常态，竟接二连三的主动找上门来。
人族高层亲自将勋章送上，只求他拯救世界。
可是，迟来的情深比草贱。
这一世，他绝不回头！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9ad8f8bfec50e4517e902fc296bc24d7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月岂","author_id":"","book_id":"7412679765724761113","book_name":"我在末世独自升级","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7414202165754858520","read_count":"274","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1180181"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.3","serial_count":"547","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,末世,囤物资,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ad8f8bfec50e4517e902fc296bc24d7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309324&x-signature=PtIOVfLeRdQRtwcpa3S2dsTwRC4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"120"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":17712,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20946,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":7070},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_au uthor_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7521420865063076633","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"[微笑]脑子是好东西，可惜不能带着。放弃大脑观看，挺不错的。五星好评。不能推敲啊兄弟们。有一说一我会看到最新章节的。回头和你们说说"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751224992,"group_id":"7412679765724761113","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwJFNcqQo2yR19kQgTj5XTw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8099fd07e85943279f3b27fab33275c9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708616&x-signature=UGfT7oToxw%2B0HAPoEMaZnO4OIEU%3D","user_id":"721726191182839","user_name":"爱吃火爆鱼泡的陈其"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"721726191182839","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412679765724761113","book_info":{"abstract":"前世，父母偏爱弟弟，让李昱感受不到爱，他想尽办法讨好家人仍不得，却依然在危机四伏的废土世界守护家人十年，为人族默默奉献。
最后竟被诬陷成叛徒，被他守护的人类审判，父母、弟弟、至爱冷漠的看着他被斩首示众。
重生之后，李昱决定抛弃讨好所有人，只为自己而活，独自在废土升级。
谁知偏爱弟弟的父母，竟然一反常态，竟接二连三的主动找上门来。
人族高层亲自将勋章送上，只求他拯救世界。
可是，迟来的情深比草贱。
这一世，他绝不回头！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9ad8f8bfec50e4517e902fc296bc24d7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月岂","author_id":"","book_id":"7412679765724761113","book_name":"我在末世独自升级","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7414202165754858520","read_count":"274","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1180181"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.3","serial_count":"547","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,末世,囤物资,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ad8f8bfec50e4517e902fc296bc24d7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309324&x-signature=PtIOVfLeRdQRtwcpa3S2dsTwRC4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":341},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7454101730789753624","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书还是很不错的。主角他只是重生了，并不是变聪明了。前世一直在守城，就算把这件事情看开了，也顶多只是看开了。人的思想是很难转变的，就是哪怕像主角这样死过一次，他自己的底色也还是不会变。主角走的是传统的玄幻修仙路，自己本身就是靠修仙这个外挂。他是没有办法向其他人那样审时度势，藏锋于鞘的。很多次危险，他自己都没有准备什么后手，很显然是个脑子不太行的家伙。对于父母家族，他从小接受的教育就是这样，怎么可能说叛逆就叛逆？最多也只不过是把期望收回来。他父母还是有实力和有势力的，面对末日废土这种世界，他的身份就注定了他不可能把自己藏起来。他自己本身没有什么在绝境中生存、在不同势力之间斡旋的能力，纯靠传统修仙路径——气运。
不要把主角想象成超人，故事还是挺不错的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735549727,"group_id":"7412679765724761113","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个有10年的书龄的老读者。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8zhFoh+8vicRZK4io20U5Lyapkx93iQ1RbAasjLitZm","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702960&x-signature=tRnwf4v8J2ikrGzX%2B9K6cLn0GrM%3D","user_id":"2129104679208622","user_name":"梦醒人间看微雨WSY"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2129104679208622","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646009887,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412679765724761113","book_info":{"abstract":"前世，父母偏爱弟弟，让李昱感受不到爱，他想尽办法讨好家人仍不得，却依然在危机四伏的废土世界守护家人十年，为人族默默奉献。

最后竟被诬陷成叛徒，被他守护的人类审判，父母、弟弟、至爱冷漠的看着他被斩首示众。
重生之后，李昱决定抛弃讨好所有人，只为自己而活，独自在废土升级。
谁知偏爱弟弟的父母，竟然一反常态，竟接二连三的主动找上门来。
人族高层亲自将勋章送上，只求他拯救世界。
可是，迟来的情深比草贱。
